creator: jss@subatomix.com
text:
The following is a possible workaround for ports/17938.  It worked for me
and at least one other person who was experiencing this
problem.  Basically, all one needs to to is recompile KDM without
optimization:

cd /usr/ports/x11/kdebase11
make configure
cd work/kdebase-1.1.2/kdm
# Edit Makefile and remove the three instances of "-O"
gmake
gmake install
cd ../../..
make clean

I hope this helps to narrow down where the problem is.

--
Jeffrey S. Sharp   (XorAxAx)
jss@subatomix.com
